ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  "government" TEXT /* Type of government of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the energy consumption data belongs to */,
  "electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the electricity consumption */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the energy consumption data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the energy consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_land" (
  "agland_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural land record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the agricultural land data belongs to */,
  "agland" REAL /* Agricultural land usage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the agricultural land */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the agricultural land data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the agricultural land data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agland_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_land_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_land_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the emission data belongs to */,
  "co2" REAL /* CO2 emissions */,
  "methane" REAL /* Methane emissions */,
  "ghg" REAL /* Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emissions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the emissions data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the emissions data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used (e.g., energy consumption, emissions) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was used */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the project */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project data usage event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project using the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used (e.g., energy consumption, emissions) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was used */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the project data usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
